text.title: tool-description-as-prompt Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for tool-description-as-prompt as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Tool name is not verb-object; description is generic
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Description: "Search the docs" — needs when-to-use, when-NOT-to-use, output shape

failure-mode.description: Marketing prose instead of technical specification
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Strip marketing language ("Powerful, AI-driven, real-time...") — model doesn't care

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tighten — long descriptions lose the model's attention

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Cut implementation details ("uses Bedrock under the hood") — model only needs the contract

failure-mode.description: Tools with overlapping descriptions cause mis-selection
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Differentiate via the "do NOT use this when ..." line pointing to the other tool
